latest.title: Rock layers store ancient environments in stripes
latest.script_key: rock layers are time stamps made of stone watch the stripe pattern because each layer can mark a different setting river mud ocean floor windblown sand or volcanic ash stack enough layers and the cliff becomes a timeline which rock clue should we read next

latest.title: Whales send songs across huge ocean distances
latest.script_key: whales don t just jump they flip like acrobats that white underside flashes because they re aiming for a perfect belly flop splash they re not showing off that s a sonar ping to stun fish below that s why fishermen in alaska call it the bait ball bomb ever seen a whale do that twice in a row

latest.title: The moon keeps one face turned toward Earth
latest.script_key: the moon shows us one face for a reason watch the moon s position because its rotation and orbit are locked together it spins once in about the same time it circles earth so the same side keeps facing us that is synchronized motion not stillness which orbit clue next

latest.title: Cats use grooming to reset their scent map
latest.script_key: cats use grooming to reset their scent map watch the tongue and paw movements because grooming spreads familiar scent across the coat that can help a cat settle after a tense moment and keep the fur ready for the next move the cleanup is also a signal which pet behavior should we decode next

latest.title: Dogs build a map with smell
latest.script_key: dogs build a map with smell watch the nose before the feet because every sniff samples layers of scent dogs can learn who passed where they moved and what changed since the last check the ground is basically a news feed what should they sniff next

latest.title: Storm clouds reveal a storm's heat engine
latest.script_key: storm clouds show where a storm is feeding watch the spiral shape because warm ocean air rises near the center and releases heat as clouds build rotation organizes that energy into bands from above the storm is not random it is an engine which satellite clue next

latest.title: Lions hunt better when the pride coordinates
latest.script_key: lions turn hunting into a team problem watch the spacing before the chase because lions can use different positions in a group hunt one animal pressures while another blocks the escape path the power is not just muscle which predator tactic should we break down next

latest.title: Bees don't just pollinate they taste with their feet
latest.script_key: bees taste flowers with their feet not their tongues that s why you see them drumming on petals they re smelling and tasting the sugar right there my favorite part they can t smell with their antennae alone they need those feet to confirm it s worth it would you trust a snack that only tastes after landing

latest.title: Forests make cooler air under the canopy
latest.script_key: forests can cool the air below them watch the shade and mist because leaves block direct sun and release water vapor that combination can make the forest floor feel like a different climate the canopy is a cooling machine not just cover which forest layer next

latest.script_key: cats don t just fall they tune their landing like acrobats watch the paws tuck in mid air tail swish to balance that s why they hit the ground running instead of face planting ever notice how their ears twitch right before touchdown

latest.title: Volcano smoke hides a simple fact you got wrong
latest.script_key: that black smoke isn t ash it s superheated steam and gas blasting out first watch this one twice the darkest puffs are actually the coolest that s why birds flee before lava even arrives what would you do if the sky turned black like this

latest.title: Lions nap on rocks without starving to death
latest.script_key: lions nap on rocks like this one because they hunt at night see the scar on that rock lions use scars to sharpen claws not just to rest that s why they don t starve they only need to eat once every three days you ever seen a lion with a full belly right after a nap

latest.title: Bees drink with their feet on flowers
latest.script_key: bees never actually drink from flowers watch their front legs that s where their taste buds live they step on petals to taste the sugar then decide if it s worth landing that s why they skip so many blooms did you learn this wrong too

latest.title: Winter dogs sniff out survival faster than we think
latest.script_key: dogs aren t just running they re reading scent maps on snow their noses catch molecules frozen in place that s why they ll circle a tree for minutes watch how their nostrils flare they re pulling air from ten feet away

latest.title: mosque domes hide a root secret
latest.script_key: i always thought those domes just sit there but the real support is underground those thin roots you see they ve fused into a living scaffold that braces the whole structure that s why the dome hasn t cracked in centuries can you spot how thick those roots look compared to the trunk
